title: Make release archive bytes deterministic across GitHub runners
rawUserRequest: 先修复该流程问题，再重新进入。Hosted 与本地同一 SHA 的 archive 必须字节一致，修复后再重新走发布流程。

sources.reason: Current canonical archive builder and failing Hosted boundary.
Premerge metadata must use the same builder.
Predecessor process correction and Hosted evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: The canonical release archive algorithm changes; it must remain deterministic, export-ignore aware, and fail closed.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root process correction before re-entering publication.

preReviewWarnings: Verify byte-identical archive output across fresh repositories and all three production call sites.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A single repository-owned deterministic archive builder is used by preflight, finalizer, and Hosted release workflow.
Fresh-repository regression tests prove identical sourceTree/archive digests without relying on Git archive implementation details.
Export-ignore behavior and fail-closed release gates remain preserved.
Documentation records the cross-runner reproducibility contract; no publication mutation occurs.
guidelines: Use one canonical archive builder across local, finalizer, and Hosted execution.
Do not weaken fail-closed publication gates.

intent.problem: The same source SHA produces different canonical archive bytes locally and on Hosted Runner because git archive serialization is environment/version dependent despite fixed mtime.
constraints: No tag or GitHub Release in this Work Item.
Keep archive prefix, gzip settings, and export-ignore semantics stable.
Reuse the builder at all release call sites.
intent.rationale: Move serialization into deterministic Python code over Git tree/blob contents so the source-bound digest is independent of Git implementation versions.

declaredIntent.summary: Replace Git-version-dependent release archiving with one deterministic repository-owned builder.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: fresh repository archive bytes equal canonical digest

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root process correction before re-entering publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
